picks.quote: I'm like, that Morab I feel like was a already a different Morab than we fought at the Sphere. Yeah, absolutely. The guy is a [__] tank.
I couldn't believe people were counting Mario out... he looked so [__] sharp. That was such a sweet performance by Mario.
Kelvin was winning that fight if it was five rounds... I was going, 'That goes five rounds.' That's Kelvin's fight right there.
Your heart says Charles. Your brain says Elilia... I'm scared for Charles, man. I don't want him to get he gets dropped and Elia hits hard.
I think Umar is a perfect matchup... I do think you've improved enough to where I think you'd be able to handle his grappling. And I think you would knock Umar out.
